channel.title: Journaling on Julio Merino (jmmv.dev)
channel.description: Recent content in Journaling on Julio Merino (jmmv.dev)

item.title: Bullet Journal review after two years
item.author: julio@meroh.net (Julio Merino)
item.description: It has now been a year and a half since I first started using the Bullet Journal principles for task tracking and I am about to finish my first notebook. This is an incredible feat for which I must give credit to the system: I had been unable to use any single task management system for so long, and I had never completed any notebook. With the completion of the notebook, it’s time for a second reflection on the Bullet Journal.
